# Theios Research Institute, Inc.

> A 501(c)(3) nonprofit dedicated to applied discovery science and the structural laws of emergence. Theios builds systems that rigorously stress-test ideas through structured scientific protocols.

Theios Research Institute develops Codex.Nexus — a discovery engine that surfaces novel scientific findings through epistemically restrictive law search at 99.9% confidence thresholds. The institute publishes founder reflections, methodology papers, and operational research on the conditions under which composite cognitive systems can be trusted to reason rigorously.

## About

- [About Theios](https://theios.org/): Mission, founding story, and the institute's approach to discovery science
- [Donate](https://theios.org/donate/): Support the institute as a 501(c)(3) tax-deductible donor
- [Pledge](https://theios.org/pledge/): Sign the Theios pledge supporting rigorous discovery science
- [Pledge Signatories](https://theios.org/pledge/signatories/): Individuals who have signed the pledge
- [Pledge Groups](https://theios.org/pledge/groups/): Organizations supporting Theios research

## Research & Writing

- [Blog](https://theios.org/blog/): All published research notes, founder reflections, and methodology posts
- [Knowledge Tiers and Epistemic Guardrails](https://theios.org/blog/knowledge-tiers-epistemic-guardrails/): How Theios separates research tiers to protect IP while enabling collaboration
- [Moltbook, AI Agents, and Emergence](https://theios.org/blog/moltbook-ai-agents-emergence/): Notes on autonomous reasoning systems and the conditions for emergent intelligence
- [On Patterns and Change](https://theios.org/blog/on-patterns-and-change/): Founder reflection on awareness, habit, and the limits of insight alone
- [Official 501(c)(3) Status](https://theios.org/blog/official-501c3-nonprofit-status/): Theios receives federal nonprofit recognition
